+    public List<string> Steps { get; set; } = [];
+    public int TotalRatings { get; set; }
+    public int RatingSum { get; set; }
+
+    public double AverageRating => TotalRatings > 0 ? (double)RatingSum / TotalRatings : 0;
+}

+public class RecipeSubmission
+{
+    public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;

+                "Stretch dough into a 12-inch round on a floured surface.",

+            Steps = [
+                "Marinate chicken in yogurt, garam masala, and salt for 1 hour.",
+                "Grill or pan-sear the chicken until charred and cooked through.",

+            Steps = [

+                "Add taco seasoning and water; simmer until thickened.",

+                "Fill tortillas with seasoned beef.",
+                "Top with lettuce, tomato, cheese, sour cream, and salsa."
+            ],
+            TotalRatings = 15, RatingSum = 63
+        },
+        new()
+        {
+            Id = 4, Title = "Spaghetti Carbonara", Category = "Italian",
+            Description = "Rich and creamy pasta with pancetta and Parmesan.",
+            Ingredients = ["Spaghetti", "Pancetta", "Eggs", "Parmesan cheese", "Black pepper", "Salt"],
+            Steps = [
+                "Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.",
+                "Crisp pancetta in a skillet until golden.",
+                "Whisk eggs, Parmesan, and pepper in a bowl.",

+                "Serve immediately with extra Parmesan."
+            ],
+            TotalRatings = 10, RatingSum = 45

data.content:
The project builds cleanly. Here's what was created:

**Project:** `RecipeCommunity/` — Blazor Web App with Interactive Server rendering

**Structure:**
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `Models/Recipe.cs` | Recipe model, submission DTO, in-memory store with 6 sample recipes |
| `Pages/Home.razor` | Homepage — displays category cards (static SSR) |
| `Pages/Recipes.razor` | Browse recipes by category (`/recipes/{Category}`) |
| `Pages/RecipeDetail.razor` | Single recipe view with ingredients & steps |
| `Pages/SubmitRecipe.razor` | Submit form with `@rendermode InteractiveServer` |
| `Components/StarRating.razor` | Click-to-rate 1–5 stars widget, interactive server |

**Key design choices:**
- Most pages render as **static SSR** (read-only content)
- Only the **StarRating** component and **Submit form** use `InteractiveServer` — minimal interactivity footprint
- 5 categories: Italian, Indian, Mexican, Asian, Desserts with 6 seed recipes
- Star rating tracks per-session user vote (one vote per recipe per visit)
